Name: Eastman Marble Saw Wood Cutter 13000 Rpm 1700 Watt 125 Mm Disc Dia Tile Bevel Depth Adjustable
Description: POWERFUL MARBLE CUTTER: The Eastman Marble Cutter boasts a potent 1700 Watt motor capable of reaching an impressive no-load speed of 13000 RPM. Whether you're working with marble, tiles, or wood, it provides the cutting power and precision you need for different projects. SAW DISC DIAMETER: Equipped with a 125 mm saw disc, this cutter allows for efficient and precise cutting. Its compact size makes it easy to maneuver and control while ensuring accurate results. BEVEL AND DEPTH ADJUSTABLE: The Eastman Marble Cutter offers the convenience of bevel and depth adjustment. This feature allows you to customize your cuts to meet specific project requirements, providing flexibility and control.
